title: MAINTAINER: amount_zatoshi parsed via best-effort unwrap_or(0), silent precision loss
description: In dispatcher.rs line 58, amount is parsed as 'amount.trim().parse::<u64>().unwrap_or(0)'. If the relay sends '0.5 ZEC' and parsing fails, the bot emits amount_zatoshi=0 with no error. A payment request for 0 satoshi looks successful but the user hasn't actually been told to pay. In 6 months, if someone reviews payment logs and sees zero payments, they won't know if it's legitimate (free test) or a parsing bug. Fix: log a warning when amount parsing fails, and consider returning Err instead of silently using 0.
close_reason: duplicate of nie-4iod.25 (same amount bug) and nie-4iod.26
